_doc: Named-concept dictionary for v1's narrow concept-inheritance edges. See spec-v1.md §II.2. Additions only at v1-snapshot slots with explicit logging. Removal requires a v1.1 amendment.

audit_log.rationale: Initial seeding per spec-v1.md §II.2. These are the four entries spec-v1 named as initial. 'Hospitality (in the instrument sense)' was specified for 076 but is multi-word and ambiguous against the bare word 'hospitality' which appears widely in non-instrument senses; deferred to a v1.1 amendment after the first snapshot reveals whether the narrow phrase 'hospitable gravity' alone catches the relevant edges.
